holdings.infoBox: FNX is an equity ETF with a total of 453 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 0.70%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 0.69%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.69%, Vicor at 0.68%, and Sanmina at 0.63%.

overview.description: The First Trust Mid Cap Core AlphaDEX Fund (FNX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX Mid Cap Core index. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of US mid-cap equities selected using both growth and value screens. FNX was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: NASDAQ AlphaDEX Mid Cap Core Index
